---
mode: agent
description: Review the UI/UX of a component or feature against the project's welcoming, organized, and playful design direction.
---

Review the current implementation for UX quality. Evaluate it against the three design pillars (welcoming, organized, playful) and check mobile responsiveness, empty states, animation usage, and interaction feedback.

If a specific component or feature area is mentioned, scope the review there. Otherwise review the full app.
